scope: single-seed exact-one-pass coordinate-only qualification of the compact Cartesian carrier and corrected Cartesian tangent metric; no joint initialization, H1b-H6 or tensor conditioning

prerequisites.qualification_decision: retain linear deterministic reductions, the fixed geometry precision boundary and Cartesian tangent metric, then freeze exactly one same-seed one-pass coordinate-only pretraining protocol

mechanism.objective: coordinate-only translation-quotient DSM in the Cartesian tangent metric
mechanism.cartesian_to_fractional: solve L^T v_f^T = v_r^T without forming an inverse
mechanism.reverse_target: the exact fractional reverse-drift tangent pushed into the noisy-state Cartesian lattice chart
mechanism.model_change: qualified compact Cartesian moment/Krylov carrier with one fixed FP32 geometry path
mechanism.reduction: target-contiguous linear-time segment_reduce without runtime sorting or CUDA atomic index_add

decision_rule.pass: the corrected coordinate representation is qualified for a separately frozen single-seed joint-initialization protocol; this alone is not H1a generation qualification
decision_rule.fail: stop before joint training without adding steps, seeds or another simultaneous mechanism
decision_rule.boundary: No extra seed or step may rescue failure. No result authorizes H1b-H6, tensor conditioning, oracle work, relaxation, DFT or DFPT.
